programmes.show_description: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories.
Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories.

The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape.
The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape.
CNBC's Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise.
CNBC's Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise.
Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. (Ep1)
Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. (Ep2)
CNBC's Becky Quick steps out from behind the anchor desk to share her family's private battle with her daughter's rare disease.
Schneider Electric's Olivier Blum: Thrust unexpectedly into the top job, Olivier Blum reveals how resilience, discipline and constant learning shaped his rise to CEO of Schneider Electric.
Why Big Opportunities Fall Short: This edition explores why Greenland's vast mineral wealth hasn't - and likely won't - translate into prosperity for the territory.
Yungblud: Grammy-winning rock star Dom Harrison, better known as Yungblud, shows Tania Bryer the London spot that fuelled his ambition and discusses how he's using his fame to launch a fashion brand.
Novartis' Vas Narasimhan: Guided by immigrant roots, public health purpose and a belief in "staying in the ring," Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan reflects on the unlikely decisions he made.
Capital on the Move: CNBC explains why billions of dollars are pouring into Europe's defense tech sector, plus why Asia's leading the way on stablecoin adoption. (Ep3)
Inside Popmart: CNBC takes viewers behind the scenes of China's booming IP powerhouse as it looks beyond its home market for its next wave of growth.
Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead.
Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead.

CNBC's 'The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors.

CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. (Ep1)
